business_problem: Workday needed a governed, AI-ready data foundation that could serve every line of business — from product telemetry and sales analytics to AI-driven marketing — and let technical and non-technical teams alike build agentic applications quickly at enterprise scale.
solution_summary: Workday built a governed, AI-ready data foundation on Databricks and AWS that supports product telemetry, sales analytics, and AI-driven marketing applications across every line of business. Unity Catalog governs the foundation so both technical and non-technical teams can safely access trusted insights, and within six months every business unit had launched sandbox workspaces and begun delivering agentic applications. The Databricks + AWS partnership unlocks enterprise-wide innovation at speed and scale while keeping governance centralized.
business_outcome: Within six months, every Workday business unit had launched sandbox workspaces and begun delivering agentic applications on Databricks + AWS, proving that the joint platform unlocks enterprise-wide AI innovation at speed and scale.
metrics: Every business unit launched sandbox workspaces in 6 months
Agentic applications delivered across all business units
architecture_clues: Databricks Data Intelligence Platform jointly with AWS
Governed sandbox workspaces per business unit
evidence_quotes: Workday empowers every line of business by building a governed, AI-ready data foundation on Databricks and Amazon Web Services.
In just six months, every business unit launched sandbox workspaces and began delivering agentic applications

solution_components.name: Databricks Data Intelligence Platform
solution_components.role: AI-ready data foundation supporting product telemetry, sales analytics, and AI-driven marketing applications across every line of business

solution_components.name: Unity Catalog
solution_components.role: Governs the foundation so technical and non-technical teams across business units can safely access trusted insights

data_flow: Workday's product telemetry, sales analytics, and other line-of-business data land on a governed Databricks foundation running on AWS. Unity Catalog governs the foundation so every business unit can stand up its own sandbox workspace and deliver agentic applications safely. In six months, every business unit had launched sandbox workspaces and begun delivering agentic applications on the same governed platform.
integration_points: Every Workday business unit running sandbox workspaces
Technical and non-technical users as consumers
Product telemetry, sales analytics, and marketing data as inputs
